rules.name: Action and Evidence
preconditions: A primary action and the evidence needed to take it are known.
rules.intent: Place the primary action beside the evidence and state that justify it.
constraints: Keep decision evidence in the same visual region as its action.
Reserve the strongest hierarchy for the primary flow.
responsiveBehavior: Move action and evidence together when the composition recomposes.
accessibility: DOM order must preserve evidence before the dependent action.
antiPatterns: Detached call-to-action bars with missing context.
verification: Trace the primary decision at desktop and mobile without crossing unrelated regions.

rules.name: List Detail
preconditions: Users select a repeated object and inspect or update its details.
rules.intent: Use the real work object as the stable bridge between overview and detail.
constraints: Do not duplicate the full detail inside each list row.
responsiveBehavior: Convert simultaneous panes into an explicit drill-in sequence.
accessibility: Announce selection and preserve focus when detail content changes.
antiPatterns: Nested cards that obscure list-detail ownership.
verification: Verify selection, focus, back navigation, and detail identity across viewports.

rules.name: Commerce Comparison
preconditions: Comparable products or catalogue objects have real differentiating evidence.
rules.intent: Structure repeated products around evidence that supports comparison and commitment.
constraints: Keep availability and fulfillment adjacent to the action.
responsiveBehavior: Turn wide comparison into a consistent fact sequence without hiding attributes.
accessibility: Give repeated products unique accessible names and explicit availability text.
antiPatterns: Identical product cards without comparison cues.
verification: Compare two products at desktop and mobile using the same evidence fields.
